name: drawpoint
description: Drawpoints — the extraction points that drive gravity flow. Colour categorically with 'colorby' (dpactive/drawbell/extra/group/uniform) or continuously with 'contour value <q>'.

basic_keywords.description: Show or hide the item without removing it.
Categorical colouring by a named attribute. See sub-item 'color-by' for the attribute set.
Continuous contour colouring of a value, with display modifiers (above/below/log/ramp/...).
Categorical colour/label by a named attribute.
Draw the item as filled polygons.
Filter which entities are drawn using range elements (see references/range-elements).
Configure the contour colour map (ranges, intervals, colours).
Apply a 3D cutting plane to the item.
Set item transparency (0 opaque .. 100 fully transparent).

sub_items.name: color-by
sub_items.description: Colouring/sizing options for the drawpoint plot item.

common_usage_patterns.command: plot item create drawpoint colorby dpactive legend active on
common_usage_patterns.description: Colour drawpoints by whether they are currently active.

common_usage_patterns.command: plot item create drawpoint colorby drawbell
common_usage_patterns.description: Colour drawpoints by their drawbell assignment.

notes: Probe live with 'plot item create <type> ?' to list top-level keywords, then 'plot item create <type> <kw> ?' for sub-options. Keyword sets here are binary-validated against MassFlow 3D 9.
